hooks.command: /bin/sh -lc 'if [ "${CODEX_STOP_CONTINUE_CHILD:-}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/stop_continue.py" ]; then exec /usr/bin/env python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/stop_continue.py"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0'

/bin/sh -lc 'if [ "${CODEX_STOP_CONTINUE_CHILD:-}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/stop_continue.py" ]; then exec /usr/bin/env python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/stop_continue.py"; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; echo "stop_continue.py not found from $PWD upward" >&2; exit 1'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking whether Codex should keep going
